blockedMetadata.description: Every STATUS: BLOCKED ticket must have BLOCKED_REASON and DEPENDENCY lines.

partnershipLedSection.description: Board contains a Partnership-Led Community Growth section with 3–5 NORTH_STAR tickets tied to concrete artifacts.

staleInProgress.description: No STATUS: IN_PROGRESS tickets older than 14 days remain without being moved to BACKLOG or annotated with a deferral reason.

notes: As of 2026-02-21, there are no STATUS: BLOCKED tickets; the Partnership-Led Community Growth section exists with 5 NORTH_STAR tickets tied to concrete artifacts; and there are no STATUS: IN_PROGRESS tickets older than 14 days that lack deferral/backlog handling.
